div.p: Microscopic view of section merging with 16-byte alignment

padding = (alignment - (current_offset % alignment)) % alignment Example: current_offset = 0x1046 alignment = 16 (0x10) padding = (16 - (0x1046 % 16)) % 16 = (16 - 6) % 16 = 10 (0xA) Aligned offset = current_offset + padding = 0x1050
Total: 24 bytes (16 data + 8 padding) • Green: main.o/.text (16 bytes at offset 0x00) • Orange (dashed): Padding (8 bytes, 0x10-0x17) • Blue: utils.o/.text (8 bytes at offset 0x18)
